scenarios.description: parse(): iterates twice over two IDENT tokens, calling handleRuleSet each time
scenarios.precondition: FakeIterator with two IDENT tokens, no exception
scenarios.expectedResult: startDocument and endDocument each called once; two rule sets processed
pseudocode: TEST TC11 parse two IDENT tokens
FakeIterator it = new FakeIterator(new CssToken[]{t1, t2}, null);
CssParser p = new CssParser() { override scan(...) { return it; } };
// verify two handleRuleSet invocations via side-effects or counter if available

scenarios.description: parse(): next(filter) throws NoSuchElementException on first iteration, triggers catch and exits
scenarios.expectedResult: startDocument and endDocument each called once, no further handling
pseudocode: TEST TC12 parse next throws NSE on first call
FakeIterator it = new FakeIterator(new CssToken[0], new NoSuchElementException());
CssParser p = new CssParser() { override scan(...) { return it; } };

scenarios.description: parse(): scan throws IOException, propagates IOException
pseudocode: TEST TC13 parse scan throws IOException
CssParser p = new CssParser() { override scan(r,i,e) throws IOException { throw new IOException("io err"); } };
call p.parse(new StringReader(""), "sid", new StubErrorHandler(), doc);
throws IOException with message containing "io err";

scenarios.description: parse(): scan throws CssException, propagates CssException
pseudocode: TEST TC14 parse scan throws CssException
CssParser p = new CssParser() { override scan(r,i,e) throws CssException { throw new CssGrammarException(GRAMMAR_PREMATURE_EOF, loc, Locale.getDefault(),";"); } };
call p.parse(new StringReader(""), "sid", new StubErrorHandler(), doc);
